methodology: Open issue total from GitHub search (total_count=935). Age buckets estimated from API sample analysis and delta tracking. Health classification based on updatedAt recency.

active.note: Stable vs yesterday after 3 new issues + batch inactive closures offsetting each other

stale_and_zombie.note: Decreased from 385 yesterday — 12 stale issues swept in today's 01:13 UTC inactive-label batch close

triage_backlog.note: Improvements driven by today's stale sweep reducing needs-repro and no-label pools

critical_items.title: agents.db backup races with concurrent writes — corrupted restores
critical_items.impact: Users syncing via Nutstore/WebDAV backup lose agents/sessions silently
critical_items.note: May be partially addressed by PR #16626 (better-sqlite3 removes write-mutex issues)

critical_items.title: [Bug]: Adding a folder with thousands of files to a knowledge base crashes the main process
critical_items.status: open — no P1 label, no assignee
critical_items.impact: Main process crash on large-folder KB import
critical_items.note: Should be escalated to P1 — crash-level KB ingestion bug

critical_items.title: CherryIN OAuth flow can be completed by a different renderer sender
critical_items.status: open (FIX SHIPPED in v1.9.11 via PR #15410)
critical_items.note: Should be closed — fix is live

critical_items.title: @cherrystudio/ai-core CJS/type exports point to missing dist files
critical_items.impact: CommonJS consumers and TypeScript declaration resolution broken for published package

critical_items.title: [CRITICAL/Data Loss]: Total Wipe of All Chat Sessions due to Monolithic IndexedDB & Full Disk
critical_items.status: open — labeled inactive, but not resolved
critical_items.note: Labeled inactive by bot, but underlying risk exists; IndexedDB is v1 legacy — should verify if v2 DataApi migration resolves this

critical_items.title: MCP/Skill references in Agent SOUL.md lack automatic validation after deletion

active_p1_issues.title: [Bug]: xiaomi mimo response only displays the last line
[Bug]: [AI_APICallError: Resource not found, default use responses API]

new_issues.title: [Feature]: Group Conversation Anchors by Turn (User Question as Title, AI Reply as Preview)
new_issues.author: SiinXu
new_issues.note: Well-specified UX improvement with verification criteria; related to #9643, #7238

new_issues.title: [Bug]: Thinking/Reasoning settings are insufficient
new_issues.author: oooskarrr
new_issues.note: Directly validates architectural SSoT concern in #16598 (DeJeune, 2026-06-30); user can't set reasoning effort for new models (M3, Sonnet 5, GLM-5.2)

new_issues.title: [Bug]: Selection Assistant fails in Foxit PDF Editor due to clipboard write delay
new_issues.author: Snowbird8
new_issues.note: Detailed root cause analysis included — Foxit packs rich-text format on clipboard copy with 200–500ms delay; suggests configurable clipboard read timeout in Selection Assistant settings

resolved_bugs.title: MiniMax M3 API returns 'invalid thinking.type: enabled'
Minimax's M3 model cannot modify thinking mode

recommendations: Escalate #16610 to P1 — crash-level KB folder import bug, currently unlabeled
Close #15409 — OAuth fix shipped in v1.9.11; issue is stale and confusing
Label + prioritize #16598 (reasoning SSoT) — now corroborated by user report #16623
Review PR #16626 (libsql → better-sqlite3) urgently — major arch change with win-arm64 caveat
Resolve P1 #13193 (Azure OpenAI 404) — assigned to DeJeune, 119 days old
Sweep 88 no-label issues — 9.4% of open backlog unclassified
Verify #15423 (IndexedDB data wipe) against v2 DataApi migration — may be resolved by v2
Close/lock #16583 (prompt injection attempt) — still open from 2026-06-29
